scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @prooftrader/shared && npm run dev --workspace @prooftrader/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @prooftrader/shared && npm run dev --workspace @prooftrader/api
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @prooftrader/shared && npm run build --workspace @prooftrader/api && npm run build --workspace @prooftrader/web
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:push && npm run db:generate
